name: io.github.freeappstore-online/mcp
description: AI agent tools for FreeAppStore: deploy status, SDK docs, app info, platform guide.

tools.name: deploy_status
tools.description: Check GitHub Actions deploy status for any app (last 5 runs)

tools.name: app_info
tools.description: Get live URL, repo, store listing, and up/down status for any app

tools.name: sdk_reference
tools.description: Quick SDK reference for auth, KV, counters, collections, rooms, proxy, hooks, UI

tools.name: platform_guide
tools.description: Fetch the full SKILLS.md platform guide

tools.name: list_apps
tools.description: List your published apps (requires FAS session token)
